mapper.select: WITH visible AS ( SELECT m.*, IF(m.SENDER_ID = #{me}, m.RECEIVER_ID, m.SENDER_ID) AS peer FROM dream_private_message m WHERE (m.SENDER_ID = #{me} AND m.SENDER_DELETED = '0') OR (m.RECEIVER_ID = #{me} AND m.RECEIVER_DELETED = '0') ) SELECT v.peer AS peerId, u.USER_NICKNAME AS peerNickname, u.AVATAR AS peerAvatar, IF(v.RECALLED = '1', '', v.CONTENT) AS lastContent, v.SEND_TIME AS lastTime, (v.SENDER_ID = #{me}) AS lastFromMe, (v.RECALLED = '1') AS lastRecalled, IFNULL(un.cnt, 0) AS unread FROM ( SELECT visible.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY peer ORDER BY SEND_TIME DESC, PM_ID DESC) AS rn FROM visible ) v LEFT JOIN dream_user u ON u.USER_ID = v.peer LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SENDER_ID AS peer, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dream_private_message WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{me} AND WHETHER_READ = 'toRead' AND RECALLED = '0' AND RECEIVER_DELETED = '0' GROUP BY SENDER_ID ) un ON un.peer = v.peer WHERE v.rn = 1 ORDER BY v.SEND_TIME DESC

SELECT * FROM dream_private_message WHERE (SENDER_ID = #{me} AND RECEIVER_ID = #{peerId} AND SENDER_DELETED = '0') OR (SENDER_ID = #{peerId} AND RECEIVER_ID = #{me} AND RECEIVER_DELETED = '0') ORDER BY SEND_TIME DESC, PM_ID DESC
